# Solving quadratic equations methods

## Short Teaching Summary
Quadratic equations can always be solved by the method of completing the squares.

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- Factoring quadratic equations

## Related Concepts
- Factoring quadratic equations (requires)

## Misconceptions
- When solving a quadratic equation, try factorisation first; if that is not possible, use the quadratic formula or completing the square.
